case_title: LOUIE, KINRY vs. ALOPE, et al

NOTICE OF ORDER DENYING MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOUIE, KINRY

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, DEPT. 622, JUDGE JOHN CONWAY, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER JANET POND. PARTIES PRESENT: PLTF KINRY LOUIE, PAUL PERDUE ATTY FOR PLTF DEFT ALOPE IN PRO PER. COURT AND PARTIES MET IN CHAMBERS FOR SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS. IN SESSION, THE COURT EXPRESSED CONCERN AT THE DEFT'S APPEARANCE OF BEING UNDER THE INFLUENCE OF ALCOHOL. AFTER FURTHER UNSUCCESSFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS BETWEEN THE PARTIES, MR. PERDUE INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE DEFT LEFT AND COULD NOT BE FOUND. THE CASE WAS ORDERED BACK TO DEPT 206 FOR ASSIGNMENT FOR TRIAL.
